extDescription.message: Prepare a video link and open ChatGPT Video Fact-Check or free Gemini — no setup needed.

sidepanelSubtitle.message: We prepare the link and captions. Then you open a free chat and paste.

step1.message: Check what we found on this page (link and captions).

step2.message: Open Video Fact-Check GPT or free Gemini.

step3.message: Paste (Ctrl+V) in the chat and send.

sidepanelHint.message: No developer setup. Use your normal ChatGPT or Google login.

guideStepOpen.message: Tap Open Video Fact-Check GPT — we copy and open the chat.

guideStepPaste.message: In the chat: Paste (Ctrl+V) and send.

guideStepChatOpened.message: Chat opened in a new tab.

guideStepCopyAgain.message: Tap Copy again, then paste in the chat.

hintAfterCopy.message: The text is on your clipboard. The chat will open next.

hintPasteNow.message: Click in the chat box, press Ctrl+V, then send.

hintCopyFailed.message: Could not copy — tap Copy again, then paste in the chat.

handoffOpenedGpt.message: Video Fact-Check GPT is open — paste and send.

handoffOpenedGemini.message: Gemini is open — paste and send.

copyAgainOk.message: Copied again. Paste in the chat (Ctrl+V).

captureIdle.message: Open a video page, then tap Scan page.

captureWorking.message: Looking for the video link and captions…

captureUnsupported.message: No supported video site detected. You can still copy the page link or paste your own transcript.

captureFailed.message: Could not read this page. Try again on YouTube, TikTok, X, Facebook, or Instagram.

captionsNo.message: No — chat can still use the link

manualHelp.message: If captions are missing, paste text here. We will include it when you open the chat.

manualSaved.message: Transcript saved for the next chat open.

optionsSubtitle.message: Which free chat should be the default?
